title: pkg/specgen: cache image in generator
body:
To prevent expensive redundant lookups and inspects on the same image,
cache the image in the generator.  Note that once a given image has been
inspected, subsequent calls will use the libimage-internal cache.

[NO TESTS NEEDED] since it is no functional change.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL.  That was a rather low-hanging fruit.

There is still space for improvement in other execution paths and also in a simple `podman {create,run}`.  It will require moving down some code from `cmd/podman` into the backend and hence take more time.

LGTM
But tests are not happy.
